name: Hot Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a thick-walled pot, combine the evaporated milk and granulated sugar.
2. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches a boil.
3. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
4. Remove from heat and whisk in the chocolate chips and vanilla extract.
5. Reduce the heat to low and stir until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
6. Serve warm.
